description_long: This filing cabinet features a modern, minimalist design with a rectangular body and clean, flat surfaces. The front side displays two large cabinet doors on the left and three vertically stacked drawers on the right, all with subtle, integrated handles that blend into the facade. The cabinet is elevated on slender, metal legs that form a geometric base, providing both stability and a contemporary aesthetic. The exterior is finished in a uniform, matte gray color, giving it a sleek and professional appearance suitable for urban environments. The back and sides are plain, with no visible hardware or openings, emphasizing its streamlined look. The overall construction suggests a sturdy metal frame with ample internal storage for documents or office supplies.
description: A sleek, matte gray filing cabinet with two doors, three drawers, and minimalist metal legs, designed for modern urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing two cabinet doors on the left and three drawers on the right, all with integrated handles and metal legs visible below.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the cabinet's depth, flat side panel, and the geometric metal leg structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unadorned back panel and the supporting metal legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flat side panel and the metal leg structure, mirroring the other side.
